stemHtml: What is correct regarding the FDM? A Flight Data Monitoring (FDM) programme collects and analyses aircraft flight data for the purpose of…

options.a: Identifying adverse safety trends and automatic reporting to the Competent Authority.
options.b: Identifying adverse safety trends and tailoring training programmes.
options.c: Displaying to the crew any adverse safety trend.
options.d: Displaying to the crew any exceeded parameter.
